message:
feat: improve search pipeline, markdown images, GitHub stats, and post loading

Search text extraction (search/route):
- Reorder regex pipeline to strip code blocks first before processing
  markdown syntax, preventing false matches from code examples
- Add HTML entity and non-alphanumeric symbol stripping for cleaner
  search tokens while preserving accented characters (Unicode range)
- Increase per-post cap from 5000 to 8000 chars for better semantic
  coverage on longer articles

Markdown image dimensions (markdown-renderer):
- Support "alt text | 600x400" syntax for explicit width/height to
  eliminate Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) during lazy loading
- Set aspect-ratio CSS when dimensions provided; use max-w-full instead
  of w-full so smaller images aren't stretched

Market cap component (market-cap-drop):
- Replace ~100-line inline AnimatedCounter with shared AnimatedNumber
  component import, reducing file from ~170 to ~70 lines

GitHub stats (github-stats):
- Switch from /users/:user/repos to /search/repositories endpoint to
  filter forks server-side and support up to 1000 repos (vs 500)
- Sort by stars for accurate counts even at page limit

Post metadata loading (mdx):
- Optimize getAllPostsMeta to parse only frontmatter via gray-matter
  instead of full markdown content, reducing memory pressure on listing
  pages
- Add safe date parsing with fallback to epoch for invalid dates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,17 +10,19 @@ export async function GET() {
   const searchIndex = posts.map((post) => {
     // Strip markdown syntax for smaller payload and better text matching
     const plainText = post.content
-      .replace(/<[^>]*>/g, "") // Remove HTML tags
-    // Remove markdown images: ![alt](url) - handles one level of nested parens
-      .replace(/!\[[^\]]*\]\((?:[^)(]+|\([^)(]*\))*\)/g, "")
+      .replace(/`{3}[\s\S]*?`{3}/g, "") // Remove code blocks entirely (usually not what users search for)
+      .replace(/!\[[^\]]*\]\((?:[^)(]+|\([^)(]*\))*\)/g, "") // Remove images
       .replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\(.*?\)/g, "$1") // Keep link text, remove URL
-      .replace(/#{1,6}\s/g, "") // Remove headings
+      .replace(/<[^>]*>/g, "") // Remove HTML tags
+      .replace(/#{1,6}\s/g, "") // Remove headings markers
       .replace(/(\*\*|__)(.*?)\1/g, "$2") // Remove bold
       .replace(/(\*|_)(.*?)\1/g, "$2") // Remove italic
-      .replace(/`{3}[\s\S]*?`{3}/g, "") // Remove code blocks
-      .replace(/`(.+?)`/g, "$1") // Remove inline code
-      .replace(/\n+/g, " ") // Collapse whitespace
-      .slice(0, 5000); // Cap at 5000 chars per post to prevent massive payloads
+      .replace(/`(.+?)`/g, "$1") // Remove inline code markers
+      .replace(/&[a-z0-9]+;/gi, " ") // Remove HTML entities like  
+      .replace(/[^\w\s\u00C0-\u017F,.?$%]/gi, " ") // Preserve $, %, and common punctuation
+      .replace(/\s+/g, " ") // Collapse multiple spaces
+      .trim()
+      .slice(0, 8000); // Increased cap slightly for better semantic matching if used
 
     return {
       title: post.title || "",
